channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Bob Dylan Adds a Dozen Dates to Summer 2026 Rough and Rowdy Ways Tour
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to this week's music update. We've got some exciting news for Bob Dylan fans out there. The legendary folk rock icon has just added a dozen new dates to his Rough and Rowdy Ways world tour, which has been going strong for five years now."
[Short music clip plays]
Host: "The new stops include cities like Cincinnati, Pittsburgh, Philadelphia, and Boston, with more shows in the Northeast and down South. And, as an added bonus, Lucinda Williams and Jimmie Vaughn will be joining Dylan on most of the dates as opening acts, with special appearances by Brittney Spencer and the John Doe Folk Trio on select dates."
[Short music clip plays]
Host: "If you're looking to catch one of these shows, pre-sale tickets are available now, with general on-sale starting this Friday at 10 a.m. local time. Dylan's been playing a mix of songs from his latest album, Rough and Rowdy Ways, along with reworked classics from his extensive catalog. Don't miss out on this opportunity to see a music legend live in concert."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "Thanks for tuning in to this week's music update. We'll be back with more news and updates soon. In the meantime, check out our website for the full list of Bob Dylan's summer 2026 tour dates."
